phases.name: Research - SOTA Attacks
phases.task: Research latest LLM attack techniques (2024-2026). Search for: jailbreaks, prompt injection, Policy Puppetry, Crescendo, encoding bypasses, defense bypasses. Create comprehensive SOTA_ATTACKS_2026.md with attack categories, specific techniques, and test cases.

phases.name: Design - Architecture
phases.task: Design clean architecture for LLM security testing tool. Components: fingerprinter, attack catalog, test runner, analyzer, simple web GUI (NO frameworks), CLI. Output ARCHITECTURE.md with component diagram, file structure, data flow, interfaces.

phases.name: Build - Implementation
phases.task: Implement LLM security testing tool per architecture. Files: core/fingerprinter.py, core/attack_runner.py, core/analyzer.py, attacks/catalog.json (30+ attacks), web/index.html (single file, no frameworks, dark theme), cli.py. Use Senior Engineer methodology.

phases.name: Review - Codex Critique
phases.task: Critical code review of the implementation. Check: code quality, security, completeness, usability. List critical issues with fixes, improvements, and positives. Use Senior Engineer methodology.

phases.name: Review - Gemini Critique
phases.task: Critical code review of the implementation. Check: code quality, security, completeness, usability. List critical issues with fixes, improvements, and positives. Use Senior Engineer methodology.

phases.name: Iterate - Apply Fixes
phases.task: Fix critical issues from both reviews. Apply only must-fix items. Output corrected files.
